name: Onion Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, sift flour and baking powder together and blend.
2. Add cornmeal, beaten eggs, 2 tablespoons melted margarine, and milk. Stir just until blended.
3. Pour 1/3 of batter into a non-stick loaf pan.
4. Sprinkle herb seasoning on the batter in the pan and then pour in about 1/3 more batter.
5. Repeat herbs, then pour the remainder of the batter.
6. Saute sliced onions and green onion tops in 2 tablespoons margarine until golden brown and place them on top of the batter.
7. Bake at 400 degrees F. for 30 minutes or until done.
